title: Senior Software Engineer - Syntel India Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Syntel India Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Syntel India Digital Technologies in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Syntel India Digital Technologies:
Syntel India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India Digital Technologies!
